鸿鹄.pinyin_diacritic: yàn què ān zhī hóng hú zhī zhì

definitions: lit. can the sparrow and swallow know the will of the great swan? (idiom); fig. how can we small fry predict the ambitions of the great?
鸿鹄.pinyin_diacritic: yàn què yān zhī hóng gǔ zhī zhì

definitions: Huang Chao peasant uprising 875-884 in late Tang, led by Huang Chao
(of a child etc) small as a mite
see 龍州縣|龙州县[Long2 zhou1 Xian4]
Longzhou, a county in Chongzuo City 崇左市[Chong2 zuo3 Shi4], Guangxi
variant of 氤氳|氤氲[yin1 yun1]
